name: Isshin Matoi
description:
[Ryuuko](https://anilist.co/character/83797/)'s deceased father who created [Senketsu](https://anilist.co/character/87510/S). He was also the creator of the scissor blade.

~!Previously known as Kiryuuin Souichirou, he had faked his death in order to escape from the clutches of Kiryuuin Ragyou, and founded the organization "Nudist Beach"!~
